content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 20 (C:20):

1. C:16 (carbon atom, connected to C:20)
2. C:21 (carbon atom, connected to C:20)  
3. N:19 (nitrogen atom, connected to C:20)

From the image, I can clearly see that atom C:20 is part of a ring structure and has three covalent bonds: one to C:16, one to C:21, and one to N:19.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file name "geomconf_3008.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 3008.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 20 (C) are:
- Atom 16: C
- Atom 19: N  
- Atom 21: C

Geomconf_index: 3008

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 20, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
